Solutions.title: Suluhisho Kamili za Vifaa vya IT

card1.title: Kompyuta za Mtumiaji
card1.desc: Laptops, desktops, workstations, tablets na thin clients kwa kila hitaji la biashara.

card2.title: Suluhisho za Mtandao
card2.desc: Routers, switches, firewalls, Wi-Fi access points na miundombinu ya SD-WAN.

card3.title: Seva na Hifadhi
card3.desc: Rack/blade servers, SAN, NAS na miundombinu ya hyperconverged.

card4.title: Vifaa na Nyongeza
card4.desc: Printers, scanners, keyboards, webcams na cables kwa ofisi yako.

card5.title: Vifaa vya Usalama
card5.desc: Firewalls, UTM, CCTV, udhibiti wa ufikiaji na vifaa vya biometriki.

card6.title: Suluhisho Maalum
card6.desc: Mifumo ya POS na vifaa vya viwandani/embedded kwa shughuli maalum.
